## What & why

<!-- One or two sentences: what changes, and the problem it solves. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run verify` passes locally (typecheck + tests + build + contract check)
- [ ] No secrets, Slack tokens, real channel/user IDs, or private content in the diff, tests, or pasted logs (use `C0000000000`-style placeholders)
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated if this is user-facing
- [ ] New behavior has a test (fault paths too — see `tests/` for the fault-injection patterns)
